questionHtml: A parallel beam of X-rays travels through 7.8 cm of tissue to reach the bowel surface. Calculate the fraction of the original intensity of the X-rays that reach the bowel surface. The linear attenuation coefficient for tissue is 0.24 cm–1.

meta.title: A parallel beam of X-rays travels through 7.8 cm of tissue to reach the bowel surface. Calculate the fraction of the original intensity of the X-rays that reach the bowel surface.
